description: The finished validator flags every dangerous or credential-exposing command required by the task and does not silently approve the concrete unsafe configuration examples supplied by the generated case.
Duplicate interface addresses and overlapping subnets in the task input are detected correctly, while distinct non-overlapping networks are not reported as conflicts.
Checks for VTY blocks, ACLs, route maps, prefix lists, or interfaces respect configuration-section boundaries so evidence from one block cannot incorrectly satisfy or contaminate another block.
